concerns: High frequency of Workers Compensation claims (28 claims).
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Historical claims include 28 Workers Compensation claims ($415,934 incurred), 8 General Liability claims ($82,656 incurred), and 2 Property claims ($215,927 incurred).

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Insured operates multiple hospitality venues across Texas, including hotels (The Driskill, Riverwalk Suites, etc.) and restaurants (Blanco River Steakhouse, Oasis at Lake Travis), managed from a corporate headquarters in Austin.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Loss summary indicates majority of claims activity originates from Workers Compensation (28 claims) with minor General Liability (8 claims) and Property (2 claims) frequency.
